output.pii_note: All inputs are processed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted.
output.regulatory_basis: 50 USC §3937 (SCRA); formerly Soldiers and Sailors Civil Relief Act 50 USC §527; DoD Financial Management Regulation 7000.14-R Vol 7A Chapter 40
output.scra_note: Per 50 USC §3937(a)(2), excess interest above 6% must be forgiven -- creditor may not collect deferred excess after active duty ends. This is not a deferral.
output.table_source: 50 USC §3937 (SCRA codified 2003, Pub. L. 108-189 Dec 19 2003); 50 USC §3937(a)(1) 6% annual rate cap; 50 USC §3937(a)(2) excess forgiven not deferred; 50 USC §3937(d) 180-day notice requirement
